    descriptionXhargreg: ”Here’s your reward; you’ll get to kill 888 ice-moths and gather their rather peculiar ice venom. Happy? What? No?? You can even keep their squishy eyes for yourself! What could be better? Now get going, I need a nap."
    value888

    completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”Finally... that took forever... Zzzz.. are you even trying? Return to me with the poison... and please... do it before the world ends... "
    majorTypestatic
